name: Molasses Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, salt, flour and shortening in a bowl until well combined. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, combine baking soda with the cold water. Stir in the spices, molasses, and hot water. Mix thoroughly.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch cake pan. Sprinkle reserved crumbs on top.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Note: If available, use Barbados Molasses; otherwise, baking molasses will work well.
